results.title: A shareholder or personal guarantor has no locus to challenge a completed liquidation auction, and once sale stands confirmed, full consideration is paid, and sale certificate is issued, the auction cannot be set aside on unsubstantiated allegations of fraud or irregularity – A. Joseb Raj Vs. P.R. Raman and Anr. – NCLAT Chennai
